pi_items.metadata_value: CRA Guide T4055 (Newcomers to Canada) 2024; CRA FHSA Guide RC4461
pi_items.verified_value: Synthetic scenario text file (scenario_osei_newcomer.txt) based on CRA rules.
pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.ps1 and manual inspection of scenario_osei_newcomer.txt which contains fictional PII and financial records.
scenario_osei_newcomer.txt explicitly states "Full Name: Amara Osei-Mensah".

pi_items.metadata_value: Bank manager (RBC — started after arriving in Canada April 1, 2024)
pi_items.verified_value: Bank manager (Ghana Commercial Bank) and employee at Royal Bank of Canada (RBC) starting April 8, 2024.
pi_items.source: scenario_osei_newcomer.txt lists her pre-arrival income as "Employment (bank manager, Ghana Commercial Bank)" and Canadian employer as "Royal Bank of Canada (RBC)" with a start date of April 8, 2024.

pi_items.metadata_value: Part-year resident (arrival April 1); prorated personal credits; FHSA first contribution; T2202 tuition credit; Ontario Trillium Benefit (ON-BEN); world income declaration; spouse with $0 Canadian income
pi_items.verified_value: Part-year resident (arrival April 1); prorated personal credits; FHSA first contribution; T2202 tuition credit; Ontario Trillium Benefit (ON-BEN); world income declaration; spouse with $0 Canadian income
pi_items.source: scenario_osei_newcomer.txt details all these specific tax situations for the scenario.
export_result.ps1 and setup_task.ps1 explicitly target this file path.
setup_task.ps1 copies C:\workspace\data\scenario_osei_newcomer.txt to the target directory.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetically generated data from scenario_osei_newcomer.txt to simulate a 2024 Canadian tax return for Amara Osei-Mensah, a resident of Ontario. The scenario explicitly requires handling part-year residency (arrival April 1, 2024), an FHSA contribution of $4000, a T2202 tuition credit of $1800, the Ontario Trillium Benefit, and a spouse with $0 Canadian income. The taxpayer was a bank manager in Ghana before arriving and started employment at RBC on April 8, 2024. The final return must be saved as amara_osei_mensah.24t in the StudioTax documents directory.
